message:
🐛 fix: Nightly Release Pulse crash on undefined nextCron (#8632)

When the Netlify github-pipelines Function's buildPulse throws (e.g. a
GitHub rate-limit on a non-default repo selection), the outer catch
returned { error } with no nextCron. NightlyReleasePulse.tsx:48 then
called cron.trim() on undefined and rendered "Cannot read properties of
undefined (reading 'trim')". Regression landed with cc20fc0f (Apr 16).

Two guards:
- formatCron widens its param to string | undefined | null and returns
  "—" early when absent.
- Netlify error path now includes nextCron (the same hardcoded
  "0 5 * * *" fallback used on the success path) plus repos, so cards
  that destructure before checking the error flag no longer crash.

Fixes demo-mode render on console.kubestellar.io.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
